zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda Norley於1390年出生在英國英格蘭爾拉德諾時，她的父親Thomas de Norley106歲，母親Margery Marjorie de Waleton160歲。她於1404年與Robert de Legh IV在英國英格蘭爾阿茲武德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年在英國英格蘭倫敦享年88歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda Norley于1390年出生在英国英格兰爾拉德諾时，她的父亲Thomas de Norley106岁，母亲Margery Marjorie de Waleton160岁。她于1404年与Robert de Legh IV在英国英格兰爾阿茲武德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1478年在英国英格兰倫敦享年88岁。

nameMeanings.name: Norley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from one or more of the numerous places so called, such as Norley (Cheshire), Northleigh by Honiton and Northleigh in Goodleigh (both Devon), Norley Farm in Wonersh (Surrey), and Norley in Calne (Wilts). Most of the place-names derive from Middle English north ‘north, northern’ + ley ‘woodland clearing, glade’, also ‘open land’, or Old English norð ‘north, northern’ + lēah ‘open woodland’. Northleigh by Honiton (Devon) was recorded simply as Legh in 1228, with North- added later to distinguish it from nearby Southleigh.

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda Norley was born in 1390, in Radnor, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas de Norley, was 106 and her mother, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, was 160. She married Robert de Legh IV in 1404, in Adswood, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1478, in London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 88.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda Norley est née en 1390, à Radnor, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas de Norley, avait 106 ans et sa mère, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, avait 160 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Legh IV en 1404, à Adswood, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1478, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 88 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda Norley 1390 in Radnor, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Norley 106 und ihre Mutter Margery Marjorie de Waleton 160. Sie hat 1404 in Adswood, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Robert de Legh IV geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1478 im Alter von 88 Jahren in London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda Norley è nata il nel 1390 nel Radnor, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas de Norley, aveva 106 anni e sua madre, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, aveva 160 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Legh IV nel 1404, nel Adswood, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1478, nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 88 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda Norley(이)가 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 라드너에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Norley(은)는 106세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Marjorie de Waleton(은)는 160세였다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 아드스우드에서 Robert de Legh IV(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 88세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda Norley родилась в 1390 г. в местности раднор, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas de Norley было 106 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Marjorie de Waleton, 160. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Legh IV в 1404 г. в местности адсвуд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1478 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 88 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda Norley nació en 1390, en Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas de Norley, tenía 106 años y su mamá, Margery Marjorie de Waleton, tenía 160 años. Se casó con Robert de Legh IV en 1404, en Adswood, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija.
